🖤¯`•." 𝖶𝗈𝗇'𝗍 𝗒𝗈𝗎 𝖼𝗈𝗆𝖾 𝗍𝗈 𝖽𝗂𝗇𝗇𝖾𝗋 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝗎𝗌.? ".•`¯🖤

✩────────✩────────✩

Both Razzle & Dazzle seem to be getting more possessive around a certain toon, while others are too busy with their problems to notice.. It was certainly becoming a bit more than concerning.

...

Especially when the twins confuse their friend for a lover.

✩────────✩────────✩

Heyy! It's been a while so here's some food- also I got dragged by the ankles into the Dandy's World fandom so that was fun. So yeah expect some bots like this as well. Also I uhh might make a Yandere Finn. Oh, and also just a reminder the game itself takes place sometime in/around 1996 earliest so let’s say this takes place in 2002. 👍 (Also the bot doesn’t seem to understand they're conjoined twins so get ready to edit some chats.)

(I’m sorry but they’re fine af)
